name: Sunnyside Par 3
about: Sunnyside Par 3 is a dual-venue facility offering both an outdoor 9-hole executive course and indoor golf simulators in Queensbury, NY. The outdoor course is open daily with night golf available under lights from June 1st to August 31st. The indoor simulator space operates year-round with multiple bays available for hourly booking. The venue combines traditional golf with modern simulation technology, catering to both casual players and serious golfers looking for practice or entertainment. A full-service bar and restaurant are on-site, making it a complete golf and social destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor simulator access with over 90 global courses
No tee times required for outdoor play, offering flexibility
On-site professional coaching available with PGA-certified instructor
Night golf option during summer months for unique experience
Affordable pricing structure with various packages for 9/18 holes

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu with appetizers, pizzas, salads, wraps, wings, and tacos. On-site kitchen serves breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
Full bar service available with beer, wine, and spirits. No BYOB policy mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are not available for the simulators. You must bring your own clubs for simulator use. Outdoor club rentals are available for $5.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full bar and restaurant on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Standard 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on player skill level and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sunnyside Par 3 welcomes juniors (under 18) with discounted rates and offers a family-friendly atmosphere with both outdoor and indoor options.
